channel.title: Design on Cedric Bail
channel.description: Recent content in Design on Cedric Bail

item.title: We Built Cross-Lane SIMD Primitives. None of Them Helped.
item.description: We built six cross-lane SIMD primitives for our Go SPMD proof of concept. We benchmarked them across ten examples. None delivered a measurable win. Every example that shipped fast shipped without them.
